description: SalesEQ is a sales conversation intelligence platform that analyzes verbal and nonverbal meeting signals and syncs insights into CRM systems. Its website describes integrations with meeting, email, messaging, and CRM tools for sales teams.
summary: SalesEQ exposes a public MCP server at `https://mcp.saleseq.ai`, authenticated with OAuth 2.0/OIDC-discovery-style metadata; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on `saleseq.ai`.
